teaching.concept: A main heading names the whole document.
teaching.howTo: Start a line with one hash, add a space, then type the heading.

candidates.title: Main heading
candidates.prompt: Write one main heading in Markdown.

matchChecks.feedback: Add one space after the hash symbol.
That is a heading, but this exercise practices the hash style. Start with `# `.
Start the heading with one hash symbol and one space.

editorialChecks.review: Keep one H1 as the document title; use lower heading levels for sections.

hints: A main heading starts at the beginning of a line.
Type one hash, one space, then the heading.
Example: `# Morning walk`
